prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Roofing, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: insufficient overhang. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IRC R905, mfr specs. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Roofing (residential job)
